'''masudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedarbird|cedarbird]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedarbird|cedarbird]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| masudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæsidith|mæsidith]] || [[word:mæsidij|mæsidij]] || [[word:mæsidish|mæsidish]] || [[word:mæsidi|mæsidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:masusuduth|masusuduth]] || [[word:masusuduj|masusuduj]] || [[word:masusudush|masusudush]] || [[word:masusudu|masusudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:masuduth|masuduth]] || [[word:masuduj|masuduj]] || [[word:masudush|masudush]] || [[word:masudu|masudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:masufduth|masufduth]] || [[word:masufduj|masufduj]] || [[word:masufdush|masufdush]] || [[word:masufduf|masufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:masuduthu|masuduthu]] || [[word:masuduju|masuduju]] || [[word:masudushu|masudushu]] || [[word:masuduku|masuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:masuduth|masuduth]] || [[word:masuduj|masuduj]] || [[word:masudush|masudush]] || [[word:masudu|masudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:masuduthul|masuduthul]] || [[word:masudujul|masudujul]] || [[word:masudushul|masudushul]] || [[word:masudukul|masudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:masuduthuthu|masuduthuthu]] || [[word:masudujuju|masudujuju]] || [[word:masudushushu|masudushushu]] || [[word:masuduku|masuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:masuduthun|masuduthun]] || [[word:masudujun|masudujun]] || [[word:masudushun|masudushun]] || [[word:masudukun|masudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:masuduthuoro|masuduthuoro]] || [[word:masudujuoro|masudujuoro]] || [[word:masudushuoro|masudushuoro]] || [[word:masudukuoro|masudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
